mapper.sql: select conversation_id, user_id, title, last_message_preview, message_count, last_chat_id, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag from fe_ai_conversation
mapper.update: update fe_ai_conversation set del_flag = '2', status = '2', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and user_id = #{userId} and del_flag = '0'
